stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Over Palermo LICJ (38°N 013°E), significant weather is associated with cumulonimbus clouds. Which of the following statements accurately describes this weather?

options.a: Individual CBs embedded in layers of other clouds.
options.b: Well-separated CBs embedded in layers of other clouds.
options.c: CBs with little or no separation concealed by haze.
options.d: Individual CBs with little or no separation.
